name: OpenTwinsAdapter
description: Formal contract and interface specification for integrating OpenCode with the OpenTwins distributed/compositional digital twin framework.

contracts.name: registerTwin
preconditions: twin_id is unique and not already registered
components is a non-empty array of valid component strings
postconditions: twin record is created in active_twins registry
initial edge_state and cloud_state are allocated
invariants: active_twins map tracks all registered instances

contracts.name: syncTwinState
preconditions: state_data is a non-null object conforming to compositional schema
postconditions: local edge_state is updated to match state_data
cloud_state is updated to match edge_state with timestamp <= 500ms differential
invariants: sync latency does not exceed OTW-I1 limit (500ms)

contracts.name: dispatchToTwinsAgent
preconditions: role is one of the supported TwinsAgentRole values (monitoring, simulation, prediction, control, coordination)
task is a valid task payload
postconditions: task is routed and executed by mapped local agent conforming to role
telemetry event is emitted tracking agent action
invariants: agent selected must exist in central skill registry

error_catalog.description: The specified twin_id has already been registered in the active_twins map.
The components array supplied for registration is empty or contains malformed data.
The requested twin_id was not found in the active_twins registry.
The synchronization latency between edge and cloud exceeded the allowable 500ms budget.
No active agent matches the requested TwinsAgentRole requirements.
